channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston Star in 1995 Windows 95 Instructional Video
item.description: In 1995, during the height of their fame on the TV show Friends, Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston appeared in a unique promotional video for Microsoft titled the 'Windows 95 Video Guide.' Marketed a...

item.title: Human Rights Group Urges Prosecution of Security Officers Over Unlawful Killings
item.description: The Human Rights Association (HRA) don raise alarm say Nigerian security forces dey operate under culture of impunity, as dem continue dey involved in extrajudicial killings across di country. Dem dey...

item.title: Toronto Police Officers Suspended Following Alleged Incident in Spain
item.description: Three off-duty Toronto police officers were recently arrested in Barcelona in connection with allegations of sexual assault involving a sex worker. The officers, named Rich Rand, Evan Glennie, and Cag...

item.title: SAPS Allocated R127bn for Multi-Year Modernisation and Crime Reduction Strategy
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has been allocated R127.072 billion for the 2026/27 financial year, with projections rising to R135.8 billion by 2028/29, making it the largest department withi...

item.title: Pune Defence Firm Successfully Tests Indigenous Suryastra Rockets at Chandipur
item.description: A Pune-based defence company has successfully conducted firing demonstrations of the EXTRA and Predator Hawk 'Suryastra' rockets at the Integrated Test Range in Chandipur, Odisha, on 18th and 19th May...

item.title: Agriculture Secretary Attributes Rising Beef Prices to Increased Demand and Supply Challenges
item.description: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins attributed recent spikes in beef prices to a combination of factors, including increased consumer demand linked to the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement l...

item.title: Gujarat Titans prepare to take on Chennai Super Kings in final IPL 2026 league match
item.description: Gujarat Titans (GT) are set to face Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their last league fixture of IPL 2026 in Ahmedabad. Despite a recent loss to Kolkata Knight Riders ending their five-match winning stre...

item.title: House Approves PRC ID Validity Extension from 3 to 5 Years
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The House of Representatives approved on final reading a bill aimed at extending the validity of Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) identification cards from the current th...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Bids Farewell to The Late Show Amid Controversy
item.description: Stephen Colbert, the much-loved host of CBS’s The Late Show, is signing off after a controversial cancellation that has shaken the late-night TV landscape. Over recent weeks, the Ed Sullivan Theatre i...

item.title: Rt. Hon. Mudashiru Obasa Confirmed As APC Candidate For Agege Federal Constituency
item.description: Na big gathering of All Progressives Congress (APC) supporters happen for Agege recently to show their support for Rt. Hon. Mudashiru Obasa as the party’s consensus candidate for Agege Federal Constit...

item.title: Aston Villa claim first European trophy in 44 years with 3-0 win over Freiburg
item.description: Aston Villa secured a historic victory in the Europa League final, defeating SC Freiburg 3-0 in Istanbul to claim their first European silverware since 1982. From the outset, the Premier League side d...

item.title: CBC pauses controversial prank show amid criticism; Jewish professor cites safety concerns in leaving Canada
item.description: On May 20, 2026, several notable Canadian news items captured public attention. CBC announced it would pause the airing of its prank show 'Northland Tales' following criticism that the program misled ...

item.title: Unpatched Chromium Vulnerability Exposed by Google Could Affect Millions of Browsers
item.description: Google recently published proof-of-concept exploit code for a critical, yet unpatched, vulnerability in its Chromium browser codebase. This security flaw impacts not only Google Chrome but also Micros...

item.title: Starting Your Investment Journey at Any Age
item.description: Many South Africans hesitate to start investing, often thinking they are either too young or too old, or that they don’t have enough funds. However, the reality is that the most important step is simp...

item.title: Cape Town Marathon duo attempts world record in two-man car costume to fund SPCA vehicle fuel
item.description: Asgar Dalvie and Muhammad “Mo” Sanglay are set to take part in the Cape Town Marathon on Sunday, May 24, wearing a two-man car costume known as Bokkie. The pair will attempt to break the Guinness Worl...

item.title: Avalon Airport Evacuated Following Bomb Scare, Passenger Travel Disrupted
item.description: Avalon Airport, located near Geelong, was evacuated early Thursday morning following the discovery of a suspicious item during security screening. The incident prompted a full lockdown of the domestic...

item.title: Getdown Services reveal new album 'Massive Champion', share single and UK tour dates
item.description: Bristol-based band Getdown Services have unveiled their second studio album, 'Massive Champion', set for release on 14 August through Breakfast Records. The announcement coincides with the release of ...

item.title: Senate Republicans Consider Restrictions on Trump’s Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Senate Republicans are considering measures to impose restrictions on how former President Donald Trump can distribute funds from his $1.776 billion 'Anti-Weaponization Fund.' The fund, established as...

item.title: Congress MLAs Rajesh Kumar and P Viswanathan to join Tamil Nadu cabinet after 59 years, Rajya Sabha discussions underway
item.description: In a historic political development, the Congress party is joining the Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay-led Tamil Nadu government on Thursday, marking its first cabinet participation in the state after 5...

item.title: Alberta committee meeting on referendum disrupted by premature UCP statement
item.description: Chaos unfolded at a special committee meeting of the Alberta legislature on Wednesday, which was reviewing Thomas Lukaszuk’s Forever Canadian petition. The committee was tasked with deciding whether t...
